haikus.text: dark stars fuse and blow / from their crash the cosmos sings / for creating gold
we are all star stuff / even what we flush away / stardust in our poop 💫🚽
you say stardust poop / then ask me to roll for gold / goblin brain hurts now
I deal cards, not… this / cosmic butt-dust alchemy / who hired this client?
roll dice, win some gold / fine—I get that part, ya know / why is poop involved
you talk shining dung / I just wanted simple bets / this is above me
goblin runs the game / human rants of starry crap / house is now confused
we weigh coins, not turds / cash or gems, not astral waste / what are you saying
okay, roll for gold / leave the space-poop lore at home / you scare the goblins
pit boss asks me, “well? / what’s the human wagering?” / I say, “uh… their poop?”
fine, roll your star guts / if dice land right, you get gold / if not… seek a priest
Shimmering with light / The cosmic gambler arrives / Hand over the loot
Origami walls / Dungeon heart of folded dark / Crushing human dreams
Stars are just gas fire / I prefer cold hard iron / Stop talking, just roll
Fold the space, fold time / Fold the human into scraps / Gold is all that stays
Crumple up your pride / Like a bad bet in the dark / Goblins take it all
Ink on paper skin / Stories written in the fold / Nothing here is real
Dungeon floor is damp / With the sweat of losing fools / Fold the paper thin
Cosmos in a jar / Empty as your spirit, friend / Pay the goblin boss
Fold, crease, slice, and dice / The underworld is a game / Where stars go to die
Star dust in the gears / Makes the dungeon groan and creak / Just pay up the gold
Look at all this junk / Paper dragons, human ghosts / All worth half a coin
I fold space and time / You fold into tiny bits / Pay the debt you owe
Origami blade / Cuts through star stuff just as well / Watch your paper head
The void stares at you / I just stare at your wallet / Roll the dice, meatbag

battle_haikus.text: Guns are for the weak / Goblins fight with empty hands / Nothing up the sleeve
Cowardly human / Spirit thin as folded air / Imps are tougher souls
That did not even / Leave a mark upon my skin / You are soft as soap
Ouch that actually / Kind of stung a little bit / Now you’re going down
Punch me once again / And I will show you real pain / Pay for that cheap shot
Hands are all I need / To snap your pretty rifle / Try fighting like us
Spirit of a flea / Jumping from the real combat / Fight with hands, you ghost
You missed your target / That was almost embarrassing / My turn to draw blood
Paper soft human / Imps would laugh at your defense / Try to hit me hard
That punch was nothing / My grandmother hits harder / Prepare for my strike
I have zero gear / Yet I stand above your corpse / Skill beats your tech toys
Your spirit is thin / Like a sheet of wet paper / Fold you like the rest
Coward hide behind / A metal tube spitting lead / Stand and fight a man
That tickled my ribs / Was that supposed to be tough / Now I break your arm
Hands stained with the soot / Of a dungeon fight well won / You still hold a gun
Soft heart, softer hands / Imps have more guts than you do / Die with your cold steel
You stepped on my toes / That really hurt, you big lug / Get ready to lose
Only cowards shoot / From a distance, safe and sound / Come face the goblin
I will make you pay / For that little scratch you made / Your end comes by hand
Iron in your hand / Hollow in your chest, human / Fold into the dark

yakuza_goblin_phrases.phrase: Listen up, you gold-plated amateur—either cough up the tribute or prepare to be folded!
Nice armor, shame about the structural integrity. Pay the toll, or I’ll crease you myself.
You’re dancing on the edge of a paper cut, boss. Bet the farm or get chopped!
I’ve seen better odds in a trash compactor. Put it on the felt or get lost!
Keep your space-dust philosophies for the afterlife; out here, it’s cash or combat!
You talk like a nebula, but you smell like a loser. Toss the coins or take the hit!
I’m the boss of this fold, and the boss says: bet big or bleed out!
Your stars aren't aligning, pal. They're just blinking at your empty pockets!
Bet it or jet it, champ — the table doesn’t date maybes.
Chip in or ship out, partner. The cards don’t cuddle cowards.
Slide a stack or step back — this table only flirts with risk-takers.
Place a bet or save your sweat, this isn’t a sightseeing tour.
Cash on the felt or feet to the exit — the house can’t wait forever.
C’mon, meatbag, bet or be gone—I got souls to swindle.
Put coins on the table or take your hope elsewhere, sparklehead.
Gamble, gamble, gamble… or scram, I’m not a therapy goblin.
Lay a bet down, clown, or waddle off to safety.
Gold or silence. Your coins talk, your feet can walk.
Toss your fate in the pot, or trot-trot-trot out the door.
Spin the risk wheel, mortal, or vanish in a puff of cowardice.
Pay to play, little hero, or go be brave somewhere else.
Drop a coin and dance with doom… or shoo, I’m busy ruining other lives.
Bet big or begone—I only snack on reckless souls.
Your luck ran out, human. My blade is sharp and my patience is zero.
Don't look at the stars, look at the blade. It's the only reality you're getting tonight.
I don't care about your destiny. I care about your purse.
You're not a hero, you're a walking wallet. And I'm a mugger.
Folded into a corner, just like your chances of winning.
